categories.label: Identity & advertising
categories.description: Prevent ad tracking and personalization by Google, Xiaomi and third-party ad networks.

checks.title: Delete the advertising ID
checks.risk: A unique identifier tracked by ad networks to build your profile across all apps.
checks.whyItMatters: Since Android 12, you can fully delete this identifier rather than just reset it.

checks.title: Turn off Google personalized ads
checks.risk: Without this step, Google uses your history to target ads shown across its services.

categories.label: Xiaomi Account
categories.description: Limit data sharing with Xiaomi through your Mi account.

checks.title: Turn off Xiaomi Account personalization
checks.risk: Xiaomi collects your usage history to "personalize" its services and ad recommendations inside its system apps.
checks.whyItMatters: Enabled by default when you create a Mi Account. Turning it off does not affect backups or Find My Device.

steps.label: Go back, open "User Experience Program" and turn off automatic data sending

categories.label: Network & sovereign DNS
categories.description: Encrypt your DNS queries and choose a provider that does not resell your data.

checks.title: Enable a sovereign private DNS
checks.risk: Without private DNS, your ISP sees every site you visit, even over HTTPS.
checks.whyItMatters: Private DNS (DoT) encrypts these queries and sends them to a provider you choose.

steps.label: Enter the hostname recommended for your country

checks.title: Turn off permanent Wi-Fi/Bluetooth scanning
checks.risk: Android continuously scans Wi-Fi and Bluetooth networks to improve location, even when you are not using it.

steps.label: Open location settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Location > Wi-Fi and Bluetooth scanning

categories.label: Voice assistants & keyboard
categories.description: Prevent always-on listening and keystroke collection.

checks.title: Turn off "Hey Google"
checks.risk: With the hotword enabled, the microphone is always listening.

steps.label: Open the Google app, then "Settings" > "Google Assistant"
Go to "Hey Google & Voice Match" and turn it off

categories.label: MIUI / HyperOS services
categories.description: Disable Xiaomi system services that display ads and recommendations inside built-in apps.

checks.title: Turn off recommendations in system apps
checks.risk: Pre-installed apps (File Manager, Mi Browser, Security, Themes, Downloads) show ads and recommendations by default.
checks.whyItMatters: Each recommendation is generated from your local usage history by the MSA service.

steps.label: Open privacy settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Privacy protection > Special permissions > Authorization and revocation

steps.label: In each system app (Security, File Manager, Themes, Mi Browser), open its settings and turn off "Show recommendations" or "Receive recommendations"

checks.title: Turn off Wallpaper Carousel (Glance)
checks.risk: Wallpaper Carousel shows sponsored content on the lock screen and collects interaction data.
checks.whyItMatters: Enabled by default in most regions. The Glance service shares data with a third-party partner (InMobi).

checks.title: Review app autostart permissions
checks.risk: Xiaomi allows certain apps to launch in the background at boot and stay resident by default, even when unused.
checks.whyItMatters: These apps can reach the network and your sensors without you opening them.

steps.label: Review the list and turn off autostart for apps that do not need it

categories.label: Diagnostics & reports
categories.description: Stop automatic sending of usage reports and diagnostics to Xiaomi.

checks.title: Turn off Xiaomi diagnostics
checks.risk: Xiaomi continuously collects usage and error reports containing information about your device and habits.
checks.whyItMatters: The "User Experience Program" is enabled by default and sends data to Xiaomi servers.

steps.label: Open privacy settings
steps.fallbackPath: Settings > Privacy protection > User Experience Program

steps.label: Go back and turn off "Send diagnostic data automatically" if present

categories.label: App permissions
categories.description: Make sure no app has unjustified access to your microphone, camera or location.

checks.title: Audit sensitive permissions
checks.risk: Some apps keep access to the microphone, camera or location in the background far beyond what is necessary.

steps.label: Go through each category (Microphone, Camera, Location) and restrict suspicious apps
